author: Viktoras S.
pros: I found chat bot application easy to use. In addition, they have helped not only with application - also shared their experience and gave some tips on copywriting, making bot user-friendly to our clients, etc.
cons: It had some minor flaws and bugs – but hey, which application doesn’t? Most importantly Amio team were always there to provide a quick fix.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: An amazing AI solution to increase customer satisfaction
description: Overall, what you should expect from Amio is a young motivated team, ready help you in the process of setting up their products.
author: Florin L.
pros: Amio provides a tool that connects AI to your day-to-day communication channels with the customer. For the moment we are implementing solutions for e-mails through the Mailbot and for chats, we have the Chatbot. These operate rather successfully in most of the countries we deliver our products to, guaranteeing the customer with up to date information on order status, return and refund situation.
cons: For the time being chatGPT4 Turbo is somewhat of a dislike from my part, but I will try to define the promt even better, so that the generated answers are more specific, and in-tune to the customer requests.

author: Tijana G.
pros: I like that the software is easy to use and their team is always ready to help. It benefits us by reducing the workload on the customer service requests and collecting leads that we can convert to customers later on.
cons: Can’t think of anything here at the moment.
author_profession: Reservations and Customer Service Team Leader
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Efficient for chat and email automation
description: Amio is a newer partner for us and to date we have to praise the overall cooperation on all points and express our satisfaction.
author: Judita Z.
pros: We use Amio mainly for mailbot, chatbot with gpt chat extension. I find Amio clear, easy to understand and easy to use as a user. Our first steps with Amio were aimed at using the mailbot to reduce the most frequent repeat queries from our customers, and we are gradually succeeding in doing this across the countries where we implement the mailbot. We are currently using the same logic with the chatbot where we will gradually want to move to GPT chat.
cons: In my experience, especially with the actual work of setting up specific templates for the mailbot, I would welcome automatic cloning of the templates in question.

review_title: Easy to use and powerful tool.
description: It made our daily workflow as customer care agents much easier and streamlined.
author: Gergo H.
pros: Their service is impeccable and they listen to our feedback - it really is super useful and the path to improve it even more is clear to us, users.
cons: There are some rough edges on the interface / loading times.

description: It is easy to use, easy to copy and paste the things you write and then you only need to modify them accordingly.
author: Olga V.
pros: Easy to use, with simple instructions it's not complicated at all.
cons: I don't have anything bad to say about using it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Martin B.
pros: The dedicated Slack channel with Amio's success manager is a standout feature, providing quick resolutions and seamless support. The chatbots efficiently handle donor queries, enhancing our campaign effectiveness.
cons: The deployment was late, but this was partly due to our own lack of effort. Better preparation and coordination could improve the deployment experience.

author: Alexander M.
pros: Amio makes it incredibly easy to set up e-commerce chatbots with its user-friendly templates and AI/GPT integration. The chatbot handles most common questions seamlessly, and the integration of product feeds ensures that the chatbot remains current with up-to-date product information. This combination provides an excellent customer experience while saving time and effort on manual responses.
cons: While Amio covers most questions well, there are occasional instances where further training may be required for niche or complex inquiries.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Powerful Chatbot Tool with Exceptional Analytics
author: Ludvík Š.
pros: Amio's software excels in providing a comprehensive and user-friendly experience for building and managing chatbots for e-commerce. The platform's analytics are a standout feature, offering a high-level view of the bot's performance and allowing you to drill down into specific conversations for deeper insights. This is extremely valuable for optimizing the bot's responses and enhancing the overall customer experience.
cons: While the tool's analytics are excellent, there is room for improvement in the presentation of data - namely the export. :-)
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best Conversational AI for Customer Support Center
description: I appreciate the flexibility of Amio. I was also impressed how fast they're delivering requested features.
author: Tomáš H.
pros: I value the most the ease of defining answers for customers' questions that should be automated. The editor is as simple as answering the question as we are used to. However, creating a complex structure with conditions or slightly different answers for different messaging channels is an option too. The biggest value for me and my team is an integration to Genesys and the ability to automate all messaging channels we provide a support on. I cannot imagine to provide such a high quality support without Amio anymore.
cons: Didn't find anything. Didn't find anything.

author: Viktor S.
pros: I like their proactive outreach. It really made an impact on the numberof total bookings we made. That's a really important thing in ourbusiness.
cons: Nothing comes to mind here. We are full satisfied.

description: It helps my client handle the customer requests and allows them to focus on more complicated requests.
author: Michal F.
pros: I enjoyed working with Amio and using their solution. The team was efficient and helped me and my client with the onboarding process well. I would definitely recommend it to other users that are looking for an AI chatbot on their website.
cons: Nothing to say here at this point. "Powered by Amio" label cant be removed
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: We haven't been using Amio for too long but so far, we're satisfied with the product.
author: Wenn P.
pros: I like that Amio helps with the customer support workload and can help customers in multiple languages.
cons: After business hours, customers cannot leave their contact information and have to contact us again via email or phone.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Michal H.
pros: With Amio, we benefit from an easy-to-use email editor and robust analytics that enhance our email bot. This combination simplifies customer interactions and provides insights for continual improvement, making our email automation process both efficient and effective for customer support.
cons: There is nothing I can think of at this moment.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Vladimir S.
pros: I liked the easy onboarding process, high amount of collected leads and the help with customer service. It is benefitting us by automating a lot of our support requests and collecting leads from our webchat.
cons: Right now I can't think of anything to put in this field.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Amio helped us automate our customers requests
author: Tomas Z.
pros: Possibility of automations for customers and saving time of our customer care specialists so they can take care about important cases of customers issues.
cons: So far nothing I would mention. This company serves us what we expected
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Nevena D.
pros: It was very easy to set up, onboarding was nicely done and their success team is very helpful.
cons: Nothing that I can think of at the moment.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
